# Step 4: Validate Output

## Overview
Verify the converted output meets quality standards, opens correctly, and preserves the intended content and functionality.

## Validation Checklist
- Verify output opens correctly in target application
- Check key content fidelity (text, images, audio sync)
- Confirm file size is reasonable for conversion type
- Validate base64 output decodes correctly
- Check URL downloads complete successfully
- For OCR: Verify text accuracy and completeness
- For GIF: Check animation plays correctly
- For CAD: Confirm geometry preservation
- For subtitles: Verify timing and text alignment

## Quality Assurance
- Content integrity checks
- Format compliance validation
- Performance testing (playback, rendering)
- Cross-platform compatibility verification
- Metadata preservation confirmation

## Automated Validation
- File format validation
- Content sampling and comparison
- Size and compression ratio checks
- Error detection and reporting
- Success/failure determination
